jql: project in (W3P, UNIFY) AND status in (Open, "In Progress", Reopened) AND resolution = Unresolved AND (assignee in (currentUser()) OR reporter in (currentUser())) ORDER BY priority DESC, updated DESC

linkTypes.name: Finish-to-Start link (WBSGantt)
linkTypes.inward: Cannot start until linked issue finishes.
linkTypes.outward: Linked issue cannot start until this issue finishes.

linkTypes.name: Finish-to-Finish link (WBSGantt)
linkTypes.inward: Cannot finish until linked issue is finished.
linkTypes.outward: Linked issue cannot finish until this issue finishes.

linkTypes.name: Start-to-Start link (WBSGantt)
linkTypes.inward: Cannot start until linked issue starts.
linkTypes.outward: Linked issue can start after this issue starts.

linkTypes.name: Start-to-Finish link (WBSGantt)
linkTypes.inward: Cannot finish until linked issue starts.
linkTypes.outward: Linked issue cannot finish until this issue starts.
